name: Buffalo Chicken Wings W/Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Add hot sauce and remove from heat.
2. Heat 1 inch of oil to 375°F in a large frying pan or deep-fat fryer.
3. Fry wings in batches, without crowding, until golden brown, about 10-15 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
4. Brush wings with spicy butter and serve warm with blue cheese dipping sauce.
Sauce:
1. In a small bowl, mash the blue cheese, leaving some clumps.
2. Whisk in mayonnaise until blended.
3. Add sour cream, lemon juice, wine vinegar, and hot pepper sauce to the mixture.
4. Whisk to blend well. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
